section_name: Disclosure of Information to License Holder

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The department may disclose information relating to a license holder to that license holder on receipt of a written request that includes the individual’s driver’s license number or the individual’s full name and date of birth, and payment of a $7 fee.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The department may disclose information as recorded in department records that relates to:
the current license status of the individual;
the completion of an approved driver education course by the individual;
the fact of, but not the reason for, completion of a driver safety course by the individual; and
each of the individual’s reported traffic law violations and motor vehicle collisions, by date and location.

history.raw: Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 709 (H.B.2190), Sec. 21, eff. September 1, 2023.
